info.title: Nebula Discover API
info.description: Public-protein discovery: retrieve → enrich → gate → simulate → rank. Outputs are unvalidated public-protein candidate hypotheses, never validated sensors.

post.description:
Trigger real de novo backbone generation ON DEMAND for a completed run's candidates. Returns
202 immediately; the GPU job runs in the background and its result appears in the run's
generative_frontier (poll GET /api/runs/{id}). Decoupled from the search so candidates return fast
and a GPU is spent only when the user presses generate.

schema.title: Response Generate Designs Api Runs  Run Id  Designs Post

get.description:
Real Server-Sent Events stream of run progress (not a static JSON list).

Replays events so far, then streams new ones until the run is terminal.

schema.title: Response Get Events Json Api Runs  Run Id  Events Json Get

get.description:
A structure source for Mol*. Prefers the experimental cofactor-bound PDB,
falls back to the AlphaFold model. `inline_cif` is populated (from cache/fixture
or a best-effort fetch) so the viewer works offline; otherwise the client loads
`provider_url` directly (RCSB/AlphaFold both allow browser CORS).

generated_by.title: Generated By
generated_by.description: e.g. 'generated from UniProt Q43125 via cryptochrome_FAD_radical_pair'

DesignProvenance.title: DesignProvenance
DesignProvenance.description: Where an invented backbone came from — adapter + model, never any credential or endpoint URL.

pareto_rank.title: Pareto Rank
pareto_rank.description: 1 = on the Pareto frontier for its lane's objectives

DiscoveryScore.title: DiscoveryScore
DiscoveryScore.description: Uncalibrated triage dimensions + lane assignment. No magic scalar or probability.

DiscriminatingExperiment.title: DiscriminatingExperiment
DiscriminatingExperiment.description: The cheapest experiment that would confirm/kill a hypothesis.

ExplorationReason.title: ExplorationReason
ExplorationReason.description: Why a candidate sits at a given relaxation level / lane.

FieldProvenance.title: FieldProvenance
FieldProvenance.description: How each compiled field was obtained — honesty scales beyond a flat list.

FrontierExperiment.title: FrontierExperiment
FrontierExperiment.description: A frontier-lane result: a plausible, measurable, out-of-family hypothesis.

KnowledgeState.title: KnowledgeState
KnowledgeState.description: Per-step epistemic status — makes the honest gap explicit.

complete.title: Complete
complete.description: true only if every step from energy in to readout is present

MechanismGraph.title: MechanismGraph
MechanismGraph.description: An ordered chain of primitives from energy input to readout/context.

MechanismPrimitive.title: MechanismPrimitive
MechanismPrimitive.description: One typed step in a mechanism graph.

seed_query.title: Seed Query
seed_query.description: explicit UniProt Lucene query for expert mode

objective_support_note.title: Objective Support Note
objective_support_note.default: State the physical quantity the protein should sense.

ObjectiveSpec.title: ObjectiveSpec
ObjectiveSpec.description: Structured, editable objective. Superset of the TS `ObjectiveInput`.

ParameterProvenance.title: ParameterProvenance
ParameterProvenance.description: Full provenance for one numeric (or database-descriptor) parameter.

endpoint_url.title: Endpoint Url
endpoint_url.description: the exact URL fetched (or the fixture path)

source_release.title: Source Release
source_release.description: e.g. UniProt x-uniprot-release '2026_02'; None where the provider exposes no version

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.default: public reference retrieval, not sensor validation

Provenance.title: Provenance
Provenance.description: Retrieval-time provenance for one provider call.

PublicAnalog.title: PublicAnalog
PublicAnalog.description: Retrieval-only public analog — analog != prediction (never spin response).

geometry_source.title: Geometry Source
geometry_source.default: canonical isoalloxazine core (generic template; not extracted from this protein's structure yet)

truncation_note.title: Truncation Note
truncation_note.default: ribityl/phosphate tail truncated to an N10-methyl cap; dangling bonds H-capped (standard QM-cluster truncation). Assumption-derived; not a whole-protein claim.

QmClusterPlan.title: QmClusterPlan
QmClusterPlan.description:
A PySCF open-shell single-point plan on a truncated public cofactor cluster.

Budget envelope is MEASURED, not guessed (recon): ~14 heavy atoms = 30 s at
6-31G*, 8 s at 6-31G, 1.6 s at sto-3g. Full flavin is intractable → truncate.

method_note.title: Method Note
method_note.default: electron-transfer partner from this protein's aromatic hopping chain (light Beratan-Onuchic heuristic; eMap/pyemap is the fuller tool). D from the point dipole is well constrained by the separation; J from the Moser et al. 1992 tunnelling decay is order-of-magnitude only (the real exchange is poorly constrained and usually taken small). Geometry-derived and assumption-derived; hyperfine is still class-level and no spin-dynamics yield is predicted.

RadicalPairModel.title: RadicalPairModel
RadicalPairModel.description:
Per-protein radical-pair geometry + geometry-derived couplings (Tier 0).

The electron-transfer partner (terminal Trp/Tyr) and inter-radical separation are read from THIS
protein's real structure; the exchange (J) and dipolar (D) couplings are the standard closed forms
of that separation. So the radical-pair model is per-protein in four inputs the generic template
fixed: partner identity, separation, J and D. Two honest limits stay explicit: the hyperfine
couplings are still class-level (not computed on this geometry) and NO spin-dynamics yield or
magnetic response is predicted. Parameter derivation only, assumption-derived, never a sensor claim.

evidence_shortlist.title: Evidence Shortlist
evidence_shortlist.description: candidate_ids on the evidence lane, ranked

note.title: Note
note.default: spin dynamics of a model flavin-based radical pair; a calibration reference, not a candidate-specific prediction

SpinDynamicsPlan.title: SpinDynamicsPlan
SpinDynamicsPlan.description: References the offline RadicalPy artifact; no per-protein spin claim.

note.title: Note
note.default: PDB = experimental; AlphaFold = computational prediction (pLDDT confidence)

UnknownParameter.title: UnknownParameter
UnknownParameter.description: A parameter the mechanism needs but that public evidence does not fix.
